## Related issue

<!-- Link to the issue this PR resolves, e.g. Closes #42 -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `chore` — maintenance or config
- [ ] `docs` — documentation only
- [ ] `test` — tests only
- [ ] `refactor` — no feature change, no bug fix

## Checklist

- [ ] I've read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] I've added or updated tests for any new logic
- [ ] All tests pass locally (`pytest tests/ -v` / `npm run test`)
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or `.env` values appear in the diff
- [ ] New functions and classes have docstrings
